name: Unleashed
description: C4SH gains increased Fire Rate with Guns and Action Skills.

name: Your Huckleberry
description: C4SH gains increased Critical Hit Damage.

name: The Determinator
description: C4SH gains Health Regeneration. The faster he's moving, the more Health Regeneration he gains.

name: Hard-Boiled
description: Fortune Skill. Whenever C4SH gains a Stack of Fortune, he restores his Action Skill Duration with diminishing returns.

name: And Hell Followed With Him
description: Press Fire during Cross-Fire to attempt Windfall and spend all Fortune Stacks to deal Bonus Incendiary Damage for the remainder of the Action Skill Duration. This effect stacks every time it's activated.

name: Shootist
description: C4SH gains increased Gun Damage.

name: Midnight Showdown
description: C4SH gains increased Movement Speed while Cross-Fire is active. Dash Override: C4SH Shadowsteps, granting him increased Fire Rate and causing his shots to Ricochet for a Duration. While Windfall is active, Ricochets split into two bullets.

name: Stand and Bleed
description: C4SH gains a Chance to Critically Hit with his Action Skills and Guns.

name: Hot Hand
description: C4SH deals Bonus Incendiary Damage. The higher his Fire Rate, the greater the bonus.

name: Trick Shot
description: Fortune Skill. C4SH gains Ricochet Chance with his Guns. Shots that Ricochet this way are turned into Bone Shards. When Bone Shards damage an enemy, they create Bone Splinters that converge around them, dealing Kinetic Damage. Enemies damaged by Bone Shards take increased Damage from all sources. The more Fortune Stacks C4SH has, the greater the Chance.

name: Devil's Tines R
description: C4SH gains an additional Augment Slot.

name: Ride to Ruin
description: Kill Skill. Whenever C4SH kills an enemy while his Action Skill is active, begin accumulating Ride to Ruin Stacks. When his Action Skill ends, refund Action Skill Cooldown equal to the amount of Ride to Ruin Stacks he has.

name: A Blur of Fingers and Brass
description: Whenever C4SH gains a Stack of Fortune he gains increased Reload Speed and Fire Rate with his Guns and Action Skills. This effect stacks.

name: Brimstone
description: C4SH gains increased Reload Speed. C4SH's Fire Rate now benefits from increases to Reload Speed.

name: Show Your Marrow
description: Cross-Fire gains increased Fire Rate. C4SH's Dual Revolvers gain a Chance to shoot Kinetic Bone Shards that create Bone Splinters around the impacted enemy and converge around them, dealing Kinetic Damage. Enemies damaged by Bone Shards take increased Damage from all sources. Reload Override: Press Reload to make C4SH sacrifice a portion of his Health to gain increased Fire Rate and increased Kinetic Bone Shard Chance for a Duration. This effect stacks.

name: Fast C4SH
description: Fortune Skill. C4SH gains increased Movement Speed. The more Fortune Stacks C4SH has, the greater the bonus.

name: Firestorm
description: C4SH deals Bonus Incendiary Damage with his Guns. The faster he's moving, the greater the bonus.

name: Burn the House Down
description: Whenever C4SH loses Fortune Stacks, lob Fire Mortars at nearby enemies that deal Damage based on the Fortune Stacks lost.

name: High Noon
description: Fortune Skill. Whenever C4SH deals Gun Damage he gains a Chance to create a Fire Nova. The more Fortune Stacks C4SH has, the greater the bonus.

name: Bloodstained Moon
description: Whenever C4SH Critically Hits an enemy, he gains increased Elemental Effect Chance, Elemental Effect Damage, and Elemental Damage. Fortune Skill. Whenever C4SH kills an enemy with a Critical Hit, lob Fire Mortars at nearby enemies. The more Fortune Stacks C4SH has, the greater the Damage.

name: Slick Thunder
description: After sliding during Cross-Fire, C4SH gains Damage Reduction and increased Movement Speed for a Duration and his Guns have a Chance to Arc Lightning to nearby enemies. If Windfall is active, gain increased Arc Lightning Chance.

name: Lawless
description: C4SH deals increased Kinetic Damage.

name: Desperado
description: While Windfall is active, occasionally fire a Free Grenade. Kill Skill. Killing an enemy grants Cross-Fire increased Action Skill Duration and Ordnance Damage. The Action Skill Duration Restore has diminishing returns. Pressing Action Skill causes C4SH to fire Rockets for a duration that deal Ordnance Splash Damage.

name: Truck Full of Nitro
description: C4SH deals Bonus Kinetic Damage with Ordnance and Gear.

name: War Wagon
description: Whenever C4SH deals Kinetic Damage to an enemy, he gains a Chance to refill Ammo into his Gun and restore Action Skill Duration with diminishing returns.

name: Pale Rider
description: C4SH's Action Skills deals Bonus Kinetic Damage.

name: Nothing Beats Lead
description: A portion of all Elemental Damage C4SH deals is Converted into Kinetic Damage. Damage converted in this way is increased.

name: Reckoning
description: Cross-Fire deals Increased Damage while Windfall is active. Press Ordnance to fire Splash Fire Ordnance Rockets at nearby enemies. If Windfall is active, double the amount of Rockets C4SH fires.

name: Mr. Pocket
description: Whenever C4SH gains a Fortune Stack, his Action Skill Duration freezes with diminishing returns.

name: Sawed-Off
description: Cross-Fire's Dual Revolvers are replaced with Dual Shotguns. Windfall: Your Dual Shotguns gain increased Pellet Count.

name: Unshaken
description: C4SH gains increased Damage from all sources for every Fortune Stack he loses.

name: From Gloam To Glow
description: A portion of all Damage C4SH is dealt from enemies is converted into Overshield. Whenever C4SH loses a Fortune Stack, shots from his Guns deal Bonus Damage equal to his Overshield.

name: Dusty Trail
description: As C4SH slides he loses Fortune Stacks. For every Stack he loses, he gains increased Gun Damage, Reload Speed, and Fire Rate.

name: I Like Those Odds
description: Kill Skill. Whenever C4SH kills an enemy during Cross-Fire, enemies have a Chance to drop Bone Dice that spawn a random Cleromancy Bone Totem. This Skill has a Cooldown and only two Bone Totems may be active at a time.

name: Bleed the Bad
description: Whenever C4SH activates Cross-Fire's Burst Fire, he gains a Chance to enter Windfall. Whenever C4SH attempts to enter Windfall and fails, he resets his Action Skill Duration and it drains faster.

name: Fast Hands
description: C4SH gains increased Reload Speed. Fortune Stacks gain increased Windfall Chance.

name: Insurance
description: C4SH gains increased Shield Capacity, Shield Recharge Rate, and improved Shield Recharge Delay. Whenever C4SH's Shield fully recharges, he gains a Stack of Fortune.

name: Splash the Pot
description: C4SH gains increased Ordnance Damage. This bonus is doubled while Windfall is active.

name: Alchemy
description: C4SH gains increased Elemental Effect Chance. Whenever C4SH applies an Elemental Effect he gains a Stack of Fortune.

name: Go For Broke
description: Whenever C4SH would gain a Fortune Stack, he gains a Chance to gain additional Stacks.

name: Thunder the Table
description: Whenever C4SH damages an enemy with an Action Skill, gain increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate. Adds a Piercing Bolt Card to C4SH's Deck that zigzags forward. Windfall: Card Shocks all nearby enemies whenever it hits an enemy.

name: Sounds of Rain
description: Fortune Skill. C4SH gains a Chance to Critically Hit with Guns, Action Skills, and Ordnance. The more Fortune Stacks he has, the greater the Chance.

name: Cowboy
description: Whenever C4SH triggers Windfall while his Action Skill is cooling down, automatically Recharge it. Adds an Acid Spray Card that spreads out in a fan in front of him and explodes shortly after impact. Windfall: While Windfall is active, throw additional Acid Spray Cards and each Card creates a Corrosive Nova on impact.

name: Trick-Taker
description: Fortune Skill. C4SH gains increased Elemental Damage. The more Fortune Stacks he has, the greater the bonus.

name: Late Scratch
description: Whenever C4SH attempts to enter Windfall and fails, he gains a Stack of Fortune.

name: Devil's Tines B
description: C4SH gains an additional Augment Slot.

name: Double-Down
description: Fortune Skill. C4SH gains a Chance to deal Double Ordnance Damage. The more Fortune Stacks he has, the greater the Chance.

name: Wretched Shadows
description: Melee Override. Throw a Grasping Tentacle Card that attaches to an area on impact. For a Duration, it constantly Slows and deals Kinetic Lifesteal Damage based on C4SH's Fortune Stacks.

name: High Roller
description: C4SH gains increased Gun Damage. The more Action Skill Cooldown he has, the greater the bonus.

name: Big Pull
description: Sleight of Hand gains additional Charges. Add a Black Hole Card that Pulls enemies along with it as it travels and deals Radiation Damage. Windfall: The Black Hole Card creates a large Singularity on impact.

name: Take the Pot
description: Fortune Skill. Whenever C4SH activates his Action Skill, restore a portion of his Health. Excess healing is added to his Shields and Overshield. The more Fortune Stacks C4SH has, the greater the bonus.

name: Stack the Deck
description: Fortune Skill. Whenever C4SH readies an Action Skill, he gains increased Skill Damage, Fire Rate, and Reload Speed. The more Fortune Stacks C4SH has, the greater the bonus.

name: Legerdemain
description: C4SH gains increased Reload Speed. The lower his Gun's Mag Size, the greater the bonus.

name: Vigorish
description: Fortune Skill. Whenever C4SH deals Damage with an Action Skill, his Guns deal Bonus Elemental Damage of that type. The more Fortune Stacks C4SH has, the greater the bonus.

name: Dealer's Bluff
description: Whenever C4SH gains a Stack of Fortune, restore his Action Skill Cooldown.

name: The Cooler
description: C4SH doubles all Windfall bonuses. Add a Freezing Shards Card to C4SH's Deck that automatically Freezes enemies on impact and deals Cryo Melee Damage. Windfall: Whenever the Freezing Shards impact anything, they shatter into Mini Shards that home in on nearby enemies that have a Chance to Freeze them on impact.

name: Ace in the Hole
description: Fortune Skill. C4SH gains increased Gun Damage for every Stack of Fortune.

name: Bet on Red
description: Fortune Skill: While Sleight of Hand is active, C4SH gains Damage Reduction. The more Fortune Stacks C4SH has, the greater the bonus. Add a Vampiric Touch Card to C4SH's Deck that deals Kinetic Lifesteal Damage, has a high Critical Hit Chance, and deals Ordnance Damage.

name: Around the Corner
description: Fortune Skill. C4SH gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate for every Stack of Fortune.

name: House Edge
description: Whenever C4SH enters Windfall, he only consumes half his Fortune Stacks.

name: C4SH Game
description: All Fortune Skills act as if C4SH has a minimum number of Fortune Stacks.

name: No Limit
description: C4SH gains increased Max Fortune Stacks. Fortune Stacks have Decreased Chances to enter Windfall.

name: Dead Man's Hand
description: C4SH gains increased Chances to trigger Windfall. Add a Bone Shard Card to C4SH's Deck that deals Kinetic Damage. Whenever it hits an enemy, it creates Bone Splinters around the enemy that converge in on it, dealing Kinetic Damage and ricochets to another enemy. Enemies damaged by Bone Shards take increased Damage from all sources. Windfall: Bone Shards deals Max Damage and Ricochets an additional time.

name: Ante Up
description: C4SH gains increased Gun Damage and Skill Damage. The more full his Gun's Mag is and the more Fortune Stacks he has, the greater the Bonus.

name: Kill Button
description: Fortune Skill. C4SH gains increased Ordnance Damage. The more Fortune Stacks C4SH has, the greater the bonus.

name: Sweeten the Pot
description: Sleight of Hand gains additional Charges. Add a Color Spray Card to C4SH's Deck that gains a Random Element when thrown and causes C4SH's Guns to deal Bonus Elemental Damage of that Card's Damage Type for a duration. Windfall: C4SH's Color Spray Card deals an additional Random Element.

name: Payout
description: C4SH's Fortune Skills gain increased bonuses.

name: Boom or Bust
description: Whenever C4SH enters Windfall, spawn a free Grenade on nearby enemies equal to the Fortune Stacks he had.

name: Tender Hearts
description: C4SH gains increased Critical Hit Damage. Windfall Skill. While Windfall is active, C4SH gains a Chance to Critically Hit with Action Skills.

name: Card Sharp
description: Sleight of Hand does not consume Charges for a few seconds after activating it if Windfall is active.

name: Hot Streak
description: Whenever C4SH gains a Stack of Fortune, the next time he damages an enemy with a Gun or Action Skill it automatically Critically Hits. This shot deals increased Critical Hit Damage.

name: Furious Fingers
description: Whenever C4SH activates Windfall, he gains Sleight of Hand Charges equal to the number of Fortune Stacks he had. Adds a Ball of Fire and Lightning Card that bounces between enemies and deals alternating Shock and Fire Damage to enemies. Every time the Card bounces, it swaps its Element. Windfall: Whenever the Card bounces, it leaves behind an Elemental Hazard of whichever Element it's currently attuned to.

name: Luck Be a Robot
description: Fortune Skill. C4SH gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate. The more Fortune Stacks he has, the greater the bonus.

name: Sweet Roll
description: C4SH gains increased Max Health. Whenever he spawns a Bone Totem, restore a portion of his Max Health. Excess Health is added as Overshield.

name: Charm Bracelet
description: C4SH gains increased Skill Damage. C4SH gains further increased Skill Damage for every active Bone Totem.

name: O Fortuna
description: Fortune Stacks gain increased Windfall Chance. Fortune Skill. C4SH gains increased Elemental Effect Chance and Elemental Effect Damage. The more Fortune Stacks C4SH has, the greater the bonus.

name: Heavenly Sevens
description: C4SH's Bone Totems gain increased Duration. Protector Totem: Roll 7's to spawn a Protector Totem that grants C4SH and his allies Overshield when it spawns. C4SH's Protector Totem grants him and his allies increased Fire Rate and Reload Speed based on how much Shields they have.

name: Red Moon Rising
description: Windfall Skill. While Windfall is active, C4SH deals Bonus Fire Damage with his Guns and Action Skills.

name: Five is Alive
description: Cleromancy gains an Additional Charge. Lightning Rod Totem: Roll 5's to spawn a Lightning Rod Totem that occasionally calls down a Lightning Bolt that causes it to Chain Lightning to all nearby enemies. Whenever C4SH inflicts a Status Effect on an enemy, Lightning Bolts spawn faster.

name: Ready to Roll
description: Windfall Skill. While Windfall is active, C4SH gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate and Action Skill Duration.

name: Riding High
description: Windfall gains increased Duration.

name: Bonemeal Ticket
description: Kill Skill. Whenever C4SH or one of his Bone Totems kill an enemy, restore Action Skill Duration with diminishing returns and Bone Totem Health.

name: Devil's Tines G
description: C4SH gains an additional Augment Slot.

name: Before She Knows You're Dead
description: C4SH gains increased Movement Speed for every active Bone Totem. C4SH deals increased Skill Damage based on how quickly he's moving.

name: Luckless
description: Whenever C4SH activates an Action Skill, enemies near him and his Bone Totems become Jinxed. Jinxed enemies take increased Damage from all sources and deal decreased Damage.

name: Can't Stop Winning
description: C4SH gains a Chance to Critically Hit with Guns and Action Skills. Whenever C4SH Critically Hits an enemy with a Guns or Action Skill, he gains a Chance to enter Windfall.

name: Three's Company
description: C4SH gains increased Windfall Duration for every Totem. Arcane Totem: Roll 3's to create an Arcane Totem that grants increased Action Skill Damage to all nearby allies. When this Totem spawns, C4SH immediately gains a Cleromancy Charge.

name: Turn of Fate
description: Windfall Skill. While Windfall is active, C4SH gains Lifesteal. If his health is full, he gains Overshield Steal instead.

name: High Stakes
description: Windfall Skill. While Windfall is active, C4SH gains increase Fire Rate, Reload Speed, and Movement Speed.

name: Fortune's Favor
description: C4SH deals increased Gun Damage and Skill Damage. The more full his Health and Overshield are, the greater the bonus.

name: Let It Ride
description: Whenever C4SH loses a Fortune Stack, the next shot from his Gun deals increased Damage.

name: Commotion's Eleven
description: C4SH's Totems deal Bonus Damage of his Gun's Current Element. Effigy Totem: Roll 11's to spawn an Effigy Totem that spawns waves of Eldritch Bullets that deal Kinetic Gun Damage. Any time a Status Effect is applied to an enemy, the Effigy Totem fires additional waves of Eldritch Bullets for a brief duration.

name: The Wilds
description: Windfall Skill. While Windfall is active, C4SH and his Companions deal Random Bonus Elemental Damage.

name: Potent Posse
description: Fortune Skill. C4SH deals increased Gun Damage and his Companions deal increased Damage. The more Fortune Stacks C4SH has, the greater the bonus.

name: Mighty Nine
description: If C4SH would enter Fight For Your Life while he has an active Bone Totem, instead gain a Free Second Wind, a Free Cleromancy Charge, and destroy a Bone Totem. This skill has a cooldown. Tough Totem: Whenever C4SH rolls 9's spawn a Tough Totem that causes his Guns and Ordnance to also deal Bonus Incendiary Melee Damage for every enemy killed. Whenever C4SH kills an enemy, Restore Duration to all other active Totems.

name: Restless Remains
description: Fortune Skill. Whenever one of C4SH's Bone Totems die, it has a Chance to Respawn. The more Fortune Stacks he has, the greater the Chance.

name: Sorcerer
description: Whenever C4SH's Shield breaks, create a Fire Nova on him, his Bone Totems, and nearby allies.

name: Tooth and Nail
description: C4SH and his Companions gain increased Melee Damage. Whenever C4SH or one of his Companions deal Melee Damage to an enemy, he gains a Chance to Jinx that enemy.

name: Serendipity
description: Kill Skill. Whenever C4SH kills an enemy, create Healing Missiles centered on that enemy that home in and heal C4SH. Spawn additional Healing Missiles for every active Bone Totem.

name: Sidekick's Revenge
description: Whenever C4SH gains a Fortune Stack, he loses a portion of his Health and gains that much Overshield. Whenever C4SH loses Health, he deals increased Action Skill Damage. This effect stacks.

name: Eights of Hel
description: Whenever C4SH Freezes an enemy, all of his Totems' Duration Freezes for a brief duration. Tainted Frozen Totem: Roll 8's to spawn a Tainted Frozen Totem that deals Cryo Melee Damage constantly in an area around its target with high Cryo Efficiency. Freezing an enemy empowers all Frozen Totems for a duration, granting them Bonus Damage based on C4SH's equipped Max Shield Capacity.

name: The Glorious Dead
description: Whenever one of C4SH's allies enter Fight For Your Life or Bone Totems dies, he deals increased Gun Damage and Skill Damage.

name: Accursed Bones
description: Whenever C4SH deals Action Skill Damage to an enemy, that enemy becomes Jinxed. Jinxed enemies take increased Damage from all sources and deal decreased Damage. C4SH gains Lifesteal against Jinxed enemies.

name: Dirty Dozen
description: C4SH's minimum Fortune Stack Count is based on how many active Totems he has. Chaos Totem: Roll 12's to spawn a Chaos Totem that draws and throws Cards from C4SH's Deck. Whenever C4SH rolls his dice, the next Card thrown can be any Card.

name: Tormented
description: C4SH and his Companions deal increased Critical Hit Damage. This bonus is increased against Jinxed enemies.

name: Graveyard Shift
description: C4SH gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate for every enemy he has Jinxed.

name: Snake Eyes
description: Whenever C4SH shoots an enemy with a Gun, fire a Bone Shard at all other Jinxed enemies. When Bone Shards damage an enemy, they create Bone Splinters around the them and converge around them, dealing Kinetic Damage. Enemies damaged by Bone Shards take increased Damage from all sources.

name: Easy Sixes
description: Whenever an enemy with a Tainted Bone Totem attached to it dies, that Bone Totem splits into two Mini Bone Totems. C4SH may only have a single set of Mini Bone Totems active at a time. Tainted Flame Totem: Roll 6's to spawn a Tainted Flame Totem that follows enemies and periodically Explodes, dealing Incendiary Ordnance Damage to nearby enemies. The higher C4SH's Fire Rate, the more often it Explodes.

name: Call
description: Whenever C4SH activates an Action Skill, he and his Bone Totems automatically Critically Hit Jinxed enemies.
